# Inspection Report - Feed Pump Train

Report ID: IR-4A-2026-0618  
Inspection date: 2026-06-18  
Inspector: S. Khan  
Area: Unit 4A

## Scope

Visual inspection of `P-101A`, associated discharge valve `V-204`, and nearby exchanger routing following operator concern about intermittent drips.

## Findings

- `P-101A` had a light but visible seal weep at the drive end guard drain point.
- Handwheel torque on `V-204` was higher than the prior route observation from late May.
- No active leakage observed at `E-330` channel head connections.
- Operators on shift referred to the machine as `Pump 101A` during the walkdown.

## Recommended Actions

1. Raise a corrective check for seal flush fittings on `Feed Pump 101A`.
2. Include `Isolation Valve V-204` lubrication in the next preventive maintenance cycle.
3. Review whether standby `P-101B` should be test-run before the next weekend campaign.

## Attachment Notes

- Condition aligns with maintenance log WO-4955 dated 2026-06-18.
- Markup comments reflected on the night shift redline drawing.
